sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51200" key="i)sofori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσο-φορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equal</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">regular movement</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀρχηστοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.97</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
